# clientkpudev — Laravel Payroll Client Portal

## Overview

Portal web untuk manajemen dan persetujuan data **Lembur** dan **Piket** karyawan, diakses oleh user berperan `client`. Data disimpan lokal di SQL Server dan approval diteruskan ke **Payroll API** eksternal menggunakan autentikasi berenkripsi AES-256-CBC.

---

## Stack

- PHP 8.2, Laravel 11
- Database: SQL Server (via `DB_CONNECTION=sqlsrv`)
- Auth: Session-based (token JWT disimpan di session, diperoleh dari Payroll API)
- RBAC: Laravel Entrust (roles & permissions)
- DataTables: Yajra DataTables (server-side)
- HTTP Client: Guzzle (panggilan ke Payroll API eksternal)

---

## Folder Structure

```
app/
  Http/
    Controllers/
      Auth/         → Login & logout
      Admin/        → Dashboard, Lembur, Piket, Profile, GantiPassword
    Middleware/
      ClientAuth              → Guard semua route /admin/*
      RedirectIfAuthenticated → Guard route /login (sudah login → redirect dashboard)
  Services/
    PayrollApiService         → Panggilan ke Payroll API eksternal
    SubscriptionCipherService → Buat encrypted headers untuk Payroll API
    ProfileService            → Logika ambil data profile user
    GantiPasswordService      → Validasi & ubah password
  Repositories/
    UserRepository            → Update password user
    ProfileRepository         → Query user + relasi client & area
  Datatables/
    LemburDatatable           → Server-side datatable untuk data lembur
    PiketDatatable            → Server-side datatable untuk data piket
  Traits/
    LaravelEntrustUserTrait       → hasRole(), hasPermission(), cachedRoles()
    LaravelEntrustRoleTrait       → cachedPermissions()
    LaravelEntrustPermissionTrait → roles() BelongsToMany
  Models/
    User              → Tabel `users`, relasi ke Client & Area, uses Entrust
    Karyawan          → Tabel `users` (konteks karyawan), relasi ke Project dll
    LemburKaryawan    → Tabel `lembur_karyawan_project`
    LemburLocation    → Lokasi check-in/out lembur
    Client            → Tabel `client`
    Project           → Tabel `project`
    Role / Permission → Tabel entrust RBAC
```

---

## Route Map

```
GET  /                              → redirect → /login

GET  /login                         → LoginController@showLoginForm   [guest]
POST /login                         → LoginController@login           [guest]
POST /logout                        → LoginController@logout

[middleware: client.auth]
GET  /admin/dashboard               → DashboardController@index
GET  /admin/lembur                  → LemburController@index
GET  /admin/lembur/{id}             → LemburController@show
POST /admin/lembur/{id}/approve     → LemburController@approve
POST /admin/lembur/{id}/reject      → LemburController@reject
GET  /admin/piket                   → PiketController@index
GET  /admin/piket/{id}              → PiketController@show
POST /admin/piket/{id}/approve      → PiketController@approve
POST /admin/piket/{id}/reject       → PiketController@reject
GET  /admin/profile                 → ProfileController@index
GET  /admin/ganti-password          → GantiPasswordController@index
POST /admin/ganti-password          → GantiPasswordController@update
```

---

## Authentication Flow

```
1. User buka /login → form email & password
2. POST /login → LoginController@login
     ├── Auth::attempt() → cek ke tabel `users` (password hash)
     ├── hasRole('client') → cek via LaravelEntrustUserTrait
     ├── Simpan session: auth_token, user
     └── Redirect → /admin/dashboard

3. Setiap request ke /admin/*
     └── Middleware ClientAuth
           ├── Cek session: auth_token + user ada?
           ├── Tidak ada → redirect /login
           └── Ada → lanjut ke controller
               (validasi token ke Payroll API di-comment karena performa)

4. POST /logout → hapus session → redirect /login
```

---

## Dashboard Flow

```
DashboardController@index
  └── Hitung LemburKaryawan (tabel lembur_karyawan_project)
        ├── Filter: id_client = client_id user yang login
        ├── Filter: type = 'lembur'
        └── Group by status → array lemburCounts
              (waiting_approval, approved, rejected, dll)
  └── Return view admin.dashboard
```

---

## Lembur & Piket Flow

### List (Index)

```
Request AJAX → LemburController@index / PiketController@index
  └── LemburDatatable::render() / PiketDatatable::render()
        ├── Scope: user areas → project.master_area_id
        ├── Scope: id_client user login
        ├── Filter: nama_karyawan, status, rentang tanggal
        └── Return JSON DataTables (kolom: karyawan, durasi, status, action)
```

### Detail (Show)

```
GET /admin/lembur/{id} → LemburController@show
  └── Load LemburKaryawan + relasi:
        ├── user (Karyawan)
        ├── client (Client)
        ├── checkInLocation (LemburLocation type=in)
        └── checkOutLocation (LemburLocation type=out)
  └── Generate URL foto dari disk custom_public
  └── Hitung durasi, counted_hours (bulanan & mingguan)
  └── Return JSON response
```

### Approve / Reject

```
POST /admin/lembur/{id}/approve → LemburController@approve
  ├── Validasi: record milik client user login
  ├── Validasi: status == 'waiting_approval'
  ├── SubscriptionCipherService::buildHeaders()
  │     ├── X-Subscription-Key       → dari config/env
  │     ├── X-Subscription-Timestamp → Unix timestamp saat ini
  │     ├── X-Subscription-Nonce     → random string
  │     ├── X-Subscription-Encrypted → AES-256-CBC encrypt(key+timestamp+nonce)
  │     └── X-Subscription-Signature → HMAC-SHA256 dari payload
  ├── HTTP POST ke Payroll API: {PAYROLL_URL}/api/data-lembur/approve/{id}
  │     (dengan headers terenkripsi di atas)
  ├── Jika berhasil → update lokal: status = 'approved'
  └── Return JSON response

Alur reject sama, endpoint: /api/data-lembur/reject/{id}, status = 'rejected'
Piket menggunakan endpoint: /api/data-piket/approve|reject/{id}
```

---

## Profile Flow

```
GET /admin/profile → ProfileController@index
  └── ProfileService::getProfile(Auth::id())
        └── ProfileRepository::getProfile(userId)
              └── User::select([...])
                    ->with(['client:id,nama', 'areas:id,nama'])
                    ->findOrFail(userId)
  └── Map ke array: nama, email, phone, perusahaan, lokasi, jabatan, deskripsi
  └── Return view admin.profile.index
```

---

## Ganti Password Flow

```
POST /admin/ganti-password → GantiPasswordController@update
  ├── Validasi: current_password, password (min:8), password_confirmation
  └── GantiPasswordService::changePassword(userId, currentPassword, hash, newPassword)
        ├── Hash::check(currentPassword, hash) → validasi password lama
        └── UserRepository::updatePassword(userId, Hash::make(newPassword))
  └── Redirect dengan pesan sukses / error
```

---

## SubscriptionCipherService — Enkripsi ke Payroll API

```
buildHeaders(subscriptionKey, method, endpoint): array
  ├── timestamp = Unix timestamp sekarang
  ├── nonce     = random hex string
  ├── payload   = JSON{key, timestamp, nonce, method, endpoint}
  ├── encrypted = encrypt(payload, subscriptionKey)
  │     └── AES-256-CBC, random IV, return base64(iv + ciphertext)
  └── signature = HMAC-SHA256(encrypted, subscriptionKey)

Headers yang dihasilkan:
  X-Subscription-Key
  X-Subscription-Timestamp
  X-Subscription-Nonce
  X-Subscription-Encrypted
  X-Subscription-Signature
```

---

## Middleware

| Alias         | Class                      | Fungsi                                                  |
|---------------|----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------|
| `client.auth` | `ClientAuth`               | Guard `/admin/*`: cek session auth_token + user         |
| `guest`       | `RedirectIfAuthenticated`  | Guard `/login`: jika sudah login → redirect dashboard   |
| `role`        | `LaravelEntrustRole`       | Cek role user via Entrust                               |
| `permission`  | `LaravelEntrustPermission` | Cek permission user via Entrust                         |

---

## Key Models & Relasi

```
User
  └── belongsTo Client
  └── belongsToMany MasterArea (via user_area)
  └── belongsToMany Role (via role_user)  ← Entrust

LemburKaryawan (lembur_karyawan_project)
  └── belongsTo Karyawan (user_id)
  └── belongsTo Client (id_client)
  └── hasMany LemburLocation
  └── hasOne checkInLocation  (type = 'in')
  └── hasOne checkOutLocation (type = 'out')

Client
  └── hasMany User
  └── hasMany Spk

Project
  └── belongsTo Spk
  └── hasMany Karyawan
  └── hasOne MasterLembur
```

---

## Environment Variables Penting

```
DB_CONNECTION=sqlsrv
DB_HOST=
DB_PORT=1433
DB_DATABASE=
DB_USERNAME=
DB_PASSWORD=

PAYROLL_URL=          # Base URL Payroll API eksternal
SUBSCRIPTION_KEY=     # Kunci enkripsi untuk SubscriptionCipherService
```

---

## External API (Payroll API)

Endpoint yang dipanggil dari aplikasi ini:

| Method | Endpoint                        | Dipanggil dari             |
|--------|---------------------------------|----------------------------|
| POST   | /auth/login                     | PayrollApiService (unused) |
| POST   | /auth/logout                    | PayrollApiService (unused) |
| GET    | /auth/me                        | PayrollApiService (unused) |
| POST   | /api/data-lembur/approve/{id}   | LemburController@approve   |
| POST   | /api/data-lembur/reject/{id}    | LemburController@reject    |
| POST   | /api/data-piket/approve/{id}    | PiketController@approve    |
| POST   | /api/data-piket/reject/{id}     | PiketController@reject     |

Semua panggilan API menggunakan encrypted headers dari `SubscriptionCipherService`.
